# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Project Overview

**cologne-hugo** is an experimental repository for hosting static sites generated by [Hugo](https://gohugo.io/) for the Cologne Sanskrit Lexicon project. It is currently treated as experimental and is not part of the main production pipeline.

Issues and tasks are tracked via the [GitHub issue tracker](https://github.com/sanskrit-lexicon/cologne-hugo/issues).
